skills.name: Market Echo
skills.description: Echo installé depuis le catalogue marketplace local
skills.manifest_toml:
[skill]
id = "market-echo"
name = "Market Echo"
description = "Echo marketplace"
version = "0.1.0"
enabled = true

[subprocess]
command = "cmd"
args = ["/c", "echo", "market-echo"]
stdin_json = false
timeout_secs = 5
